refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for the load→travel→dump cycle by optimizing load handling, travel efficiency, and dump operations.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and high-level. Decomposing it into sub-functions targeting each phase of the cycle (load, travel, dump) allows focused design parameters and clearer verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure cycle time p95 for each sub-cycle phase under defined duty cycle and site conditions; verify combined cycle meets CT_target.

candidate_dps: Optimized travel path planning and control
selected_dp.selected_dp: Automated load handling system; Optimized travel path planning and control; Efficient dump mechanism control

potential_sources: Interdependency between travel path planning and load handling timing
Synchronization between dump operation and travel completion
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically decoupled by phase but require interface coordination; manageable with clear interface definitions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate telemetry data for travel optimization
Risk of timing mismatch between phases impacting overall cycle time
High safety criticality requires robust fail-safe mechanisms in automation
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit interface definitions between DPs to manage phase transitions and timing coordination.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system integration and coordination of load, travel, and dump functions

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Provides real-time data for travel optimization and load/dump status monitoring

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives operational commands and cycle targets from higher-level control

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends safety alerts triggered by cycle anomalies or safety events

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Enables communication between NGHE Solution and Teleoperation and Safety Services modules

module_containment_scores.notes: Central integration module with high containment of cycle time functions; low diffusion risk.
Physical execution of load, travel, dump but less control logic containment.
Supports manual override and remote control; potential diffusion if cycle logic duplicated.
Monitors safety but not primary cycle time control; interfaces with alerts.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing cycle time optimization logic in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and improves coordination.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module due to integration of multiple sub-functions
Dependency on accurate and timely data from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts and modularize sub-functions within NGHE Solution to manage complexity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR decomposition is clear and logically maps to selected DPs with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Risk of duplicating cycle logic in Teleoperation if not properly modularized
Complexity in NGHE Solution module may increase maintenance effort
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: NGHE Solution module shows strong containment; interfaces to other modules are well defined.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and cycle time measurements at NGHE Solution level.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Allocation of cycle time functions to NGHE Solution module is clear and aligns with stakeholder needs.

recommended_revisions: Refine interface definitions to prevent logic duplication in Teleoperation module
Modularize NGHE Solution internal functions to reduce complexity

decision.justification: Current decomposition and assignments meet criteria with acceptable risks; ready to proceed to next design level or implementation.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; recommendations are for future refinement.

assumptions: Telemetry data is accurate and timely
Safety criticality is addressed in Safety Services module
Cycle phases can be logically separated
open_risks: Potential timing mismatches between cycle phases
Complexity management in NGHE Solution module
evidence_needed: Cycle time measurements under operational conditions
